title: Goliath Games Cranium: Original - Spell, Solve, Act & Draw Your Way to Victory - The Original Brainy Board Game - For 4+ Players Ages 12+
features: The classic brain game is back and better than ever with 18 activities and over 800 different challenges
Compete in teams and be ready to draw, sculpt, act, rhyme, or anything else that comes your way
There’s something for everyone, from the artists to the brainiacs, so no game night will ever be the same!
Be the first team to make it all the way around the board to win - recommended for 4 or more players, ages 12 and up
Includes 1 Game Board, 2 Movers, 200 Cards, 1 Card Box, 8 Bonus Coins, 2 Markers, 2 Whiteboards, Cranium Clay, 1 Sand Timer, 1 Die, 1 Reference Sheet, and Complete Instructions
description: Product Description The classic brain game is back and better than ever with 18 activities and over 800 different challenges Compete in teams and be ready to draw, sculpt, act, rhyme, or anything else that comes your way There’s something for everyone, from the artists to the brainiacs, so no game night will ever be the same! Be the first team to make it all the way around the board to win - recommended for 4 or more players, ages 12 and up Includes 1 Game Board, 2 Movers, 200 Cards, 1 Card Box, 8 Bonus Coins, 2 Markers, 2 Whiteboards, Cranium Clay, 1 Sand Timer, 1 Die, 1 Reference Sheet, and Complete Instructions Safety Warning No warning applicable.
